sentences.target: Ich mache ein Kreuz auf dem Formular.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈmaxə aɪn kʁɔʏ̯ts aʊf deːm fɔʁmuˈlaːʁ/

translations.de: Ich mache ein Kreuz auf dem Formular.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈmaxə aɪn kʁɔʏ̯ts aʊf deːm fɔʁmuˈlaːʁ/
translations.en: I mark an X on the form.
translations.es: Marco una X en el formulario.
translations.fr: Je mets une croix sur le formulaire.
translations.pt: Eu marco um X no formulário.
translations.vi: Tôi đánh dấu X vào mẫu đơn.
translations.nl: Ik zet een kruisje op het formulier.
translations.hi: मैं फॉर्म पर X का निशान लगाता हूँ।
translations.nb: Jeg setter et kryss på skjemaet.
translations.id: Saya memberi tanda X pada formulir.
translations.sv: Jag sätter ett kryss i formuläret.
translations.da: Jeg sætter et kryds på formularen.

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Main lexical verb, finite present 1st singular; takes the direct object 'ein Kreuz' and the PP 'auf dem Formular'.
Indefinite article, accusative neuter singular; determiner of 'Kreuz'.
Common noun (neuter); direct object. Here: a check mark/X placed on a form.
Two-way preposition; here locative (static position) → governs dative; introduces the PP 'auf dem Formular'.
Definite article, dative neuter singular; determiner of 'Formular' required by 'auf' in a locative sense.
Common noun (neuter); object of the preposition 'auf'.

sentences.target: Mein Kreuz tut seit Tagen wieder weh.
sentences.reading: /maɪ̯n kʁɔʏ̯ts tuːt zaɪ̯t ˈtaːɡən ˈviːdɐ veː/

translations.de: Mein Kreuz tut seit Tagen wieder weh.
translations.ipa: /maɪ̯n kʁɔʏ̯ts tuːt zaɪ̯t ˈtaːɡən ˈviːdɐ veː/
translations.en: My back has been hurting again for days.
translations.es: La espalda me duele otra vez desde hace días.
translations.fr: J’ai de nouveau mal au dos depuis des jours.
translations.it: Mi fa di nuovo male la schiena da giorni.
translations.ru: У меня уже несколько дней снова болит поясница.
translations.pt: Minhas costas estão doendo de novo há dias.
translations.he: הגב שלי שוב כואב כבר כמה ימים.
translations.vi: Lưng tôi lại đau mấy ngày nay.
translations.ar: ظهري يؤلمني من جديد منذ عدة أيام.
translations.nl: Mijn rug doet al dagen weer pijn.
translations.uk: У мене вже кілька днів знову болить спина.
translations.hu: Napok óta megint fáj a hátam.
translations.hi: मेरी पीठ कई दिनों से फिर से दर्द कर रही है।
translations.pl: Od kilku dni znowu bolą mnie plecy.
translations.el: Η πλάτη μου πονάει ξανά εδώ και μέρες.
translations.nb: Ryggen min har gjort vondt igjen i flere dager.
translations.id: Punggung saya sudah beberapa hari ini sakit lagi.
translations.sv: Ryggen har gjort ont igen i flera dagar.
translations.ro: Mă doare spatele din nou de câteva zile.
translations.cs: Už několik dní mě zase bolí záda.
translations.da: Ryggen har gjort ondt igen i flere dage.
translations.fi: Selkäni on ollut taas kipeä jo monta päivää.
translations.ja: ここ数日また腰が痛いです。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, nominative neuter singular; modifies the subject 'Kreuz'.
Common noun (neuter); subject. Here denoting the body part (lower back).
Main verb, 3rd person singular present; part of the light-verb construction 'weh tun' meaning 'to hurt'.
Preposition governing dative; introduces a time span ('seit Tagen').
Common noun, dative plural; object of 'seit' indicating duration.
Temporal adverb; indicates repetition.
Adjective used predicatively in the fixed expression 'weh tun' ('to hurt').

sentences.target: Sie trägt ein kleines Kreuz um den Hals.
sentences.reading: /ziː tʁɛːkt aɪn ˈklaɪ̯nəs kʁɔʏ̯ts ʊm den hals/

translations.de: Sie trägt ein kleines Kreuz um den Hals.
translations.ipa: /ziː tʁɛːkt aɪn ˈklaɪ̯nəs kʁɔʏ̯ts ʊm den hals/
translations.en: She wears a small cross around her neck.
translations.es: Lleva una pequeña cruz en el cuello.
translations.fr: Elle porte une petite croix au cou.
translations.it: Porta una piccola croce al collo.
translations.ko: 목에 작은 십자가 목걸이를 하고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 她脖子上戴着一个小十字架。
translations.yue: 佢條頸戴住個細十字架。
translations.ru: Она носит на шее маленький крестик.
translations.pt: Ela usa uma cruz pequena no pescoço.
translations.he: היא עונדת צלב קטן על הצוואר.
translations.vi: Cô ấy đeo một cây thánh giá nhỏ trên cổ.
translations.ar: إنها ترتدي صليبًا صغيرًا حول عنقها.
translations.nl: Ze draagt een klein kruisje om haar nek.
translations.uk: Вона носить на шиї маленький хрестик.
translations.hi: वह गर्दन में छोटा सलीब पहनती है।
translations.el: Φοράει έναν μικρό σταυρό στο λαιμό.
translations.nb: Hun har et lite kors rundt halsen.
translations.id: Dia memakai salib kecil di lehernya.
translations.sv: Hon bär ett litet kors runt halsen.
translations.ro: Poartă o cruciuliță mică la gât.
translations.da: Hun bærer et lille kors om halsen.
translations.ja: 彼女は首に小さな十字架をつけている。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular nominative; subject.
Main verb, 3rd person singular present; governs the direct object 'ein kleines Kreuz' and PP 'um den Hals'.
Indefinite article, accusative neuter singular; determiner of 'Kreuz'.
Attributive adjective, accusative neuter singular; agrees with 'Kreuz'.
Common noun (neuter); direct object. Here: a cross pendant.
Preposition governing accusative; introduces the PP 'um den Hals' (spatial).
Definite article, accusative masculine singular; determiner of 'Hals' required by 'um'.
Common noun (masculine); object of the preposition 'um'.

sentences.target: Das Rote Kreuz sammelt heute Spenden vor dem Markt.
sentences.reading: /das ˈʁoːtə kʁɔʏ̯ts ˈzaməlt ˈhɔʏ̯tə ˈʃpɛndən foːɐ̯ deːm maʁkt/

translations.de: Das Rote Kreuz sammelt heute Spenden vor dem Markt.
translations.ipa: /das ˈʁoːtə kʁɔʏ̯ts ˈzaməlt ˈhɔʏ̯tə ˈʃpɛndən foːɐ̯ deːm maʁkt/
translations.en: The Red Cross is collecting donations in front of the market today.
translations.es: La Cruz Roja está recogiendo donaciones hoy frente al mercado.
translations.fr: La Croix-Rouge collecte des dons devant le marché aujourd’hui.
translations.it: La Croce Rossa oggi raccoglie donazioni davanti al mercato.
translations.ko: 오늘 적십자사가 시장 앞에서 기부금을 모금하고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 红十字会今天在市场门口募捐。
translations.yue: 紅十字會今日喺市場門口籌款。
translations.ru: Сегодня Красный Крест собирает пожертвования у рынка.
translations.pt: A Cruz Vermelha está arrecadando doações hoje em frente ao mercado.
translations.he: הצלב האדום אוסף תרומות היום מול השוק.
translations.tr: Kızılhaç bugün marketin önünde bağış topluyor.
translations.vi: Hôm nay Hội Chữ thập đỏ đang quyên góp trước chợ.
translations.ar: الصليب الأحمر يجمع التبرعات اليوم أمام السوق.
translations.nl: Het Rode Kruis zamelt vandaag donaties in voor de markt.
translations.uk: Червоний Хрест сьогодні збирає пожертви перед ринком.
translations.hu: A Vöröskereszt ma adományokat gyűjt a piac előtt.
translations.hi: रेड क्रॉस आज बाज़ार के सामने चंदा इकट्ठा कर रहा है।
translations.pl: Czerwony Krzyż dziś zbiera datki przed targiem.
translations.el: Ο Ερυθρός Σταυρός μαζεύει σήμερα δωρεές μπροστά στην αγορά.
translations.nb: Røde Kors samler inn donasjoner foran markedet i dag.
translations.id: Palang Merah hari ini menggalang donasi di depan pasar.
translations.sv: Röda Korset samlar in donationer framför marknaden i dag.
translations.ro: Crucea Roșie strânge donații astăzi în fața pieței.
translations.cs: Červený kříž dnes vybírá příspěvky před trhem.
translations.da: Røde Kors samler i dag donationer ind foran markedet.
translations.fi: Punainen Risti kerää tänään lahjoituksia torin edessä.
translations.ja: 赤十字社は今日市場の前で募金を集めています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative neuter singular; introduces the subject NP (not part of the proper name).
Proper-name element; part of the organization name 'Das Rote Kreuz'.
Proper-name element; part of the organization name; head of the named entity.
Main verb, 3rd person singular present; takes 'Spenden' as direct object and a locative PP.
Temporal adverb; modifies the verb ('when').
Common noun, plural; direct object of 'sammelt'.
Preposition governing dative; introduces the locative PP 'vor dem Markt'.
Definite article, dative masculine singular; determiner of 'Markt' required by 'vor' (location).
Common noun (masculine); object of the preposition 'vor'.
